---
author: ""
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{rotating}
   - \usepackage{float}
   - \usepackage{natbib}
   - \usepackage{booktabs}
   - \usepackage{multirow}
geometry: "left=1cm,right=1cm,top=0.9cm,bottom=1.2cm"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    citation_package: natbib
    keep_tex: false
    number_sections: true
link-citations: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)
library(xtable)
library(stringr) # For str_remove and strcat (if pracma is not used)
library(reshape2) # For cast()
library(this.path)
setwd(this.path::this.dir())

# --- prepare data
data <- readRDS("../g_referee_responses/r5_minor3/tmp/reg_results/fm.RDS")

# choose and label variables
tmp <- data.table(var = c("ofi", paste0("ofi_absofi_", 1:4)))
tmp <- rbind(tmp, data.table(var = c("ofi_absofi_2 - ofi_absofi_1", "ofi_absofi_3 - ofi_absofi_1", "ofi_absofi_4 - ofi_absofi_1")))[, idx := .I]
tmp[var == "ofi", var_lab := "$d_{n,t}$"]

# tmp[2:5, var_lab := paste0("$d_{n,t} \\times \\text{Unif}(|d_{n,t-", 1:4, "}|)$")]
# tmp[6:8, var_lab := paste0("$d_{n,t} \\times \\text{Unif}(|d_{n,t-", 2:4, "}|) - d_{n,t} \\times \\text{Unif}(|d_{n,t-1}|)$")]
tmp[2:5, var_lab := paste0("$d_{n,t} \\times |d_{n,t-", 1:4, "}|$")]
tmp[6:8, var_lab := paste0("$d_{n,t} \\times |d_{n,t-", 2:4, "}| - d_{n,t} \\times |d_{n,t-1}|$")]
data <- merge(data, tmp, by = "var")
rm(tmp)

# choose specifications
data[, type_idx := ifelse(type == "FIT", 1, 2)]
tmp <- unique(data[, .(type_idx, spec_idx)])[order(type_idx, spec_idx)][, reg_idx := .I]
data <- merge(data, tmp, by = c("type_idx", "spec_idx"))
rm(tmp)

# --- panel A, regression results
tmp <- data[idx %in% 1:5]

# add stars to coefficients
cuts <- abs(qnorm(c(.01, .05, .1) / 2))
tmp[, abs_tstat := abs(coef / se)]
tmp[, ss := ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[1], 3, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[2], 2, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[3], 1, 0)))]
tmp[, coef_lab := paste0("$", sprintf("%.2f", coef))]
tmp[, ss_lab := sapply(tmp[, ss], function(x) {
  ifelse(x > 0,
    # paste0("^{", strcat(rep("*", x)), "}$"),
    paste0("^{", strrep("*", x), "}$"),
    "$"
  )
})]
tmp[, coef_lab := paste0(coef_lab, ss_lab)]
tmp[, ss_lab := NULL]

est <- dcast(tmp[, .(idx, reg_idx, coef_lab)], idx ~ reg_idx, value.var = "coef_lab") %>%
  mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number(), type = "coef") %>%
  mutate(across(1:ncol(.), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "", .x)))

se <- dcast(tmp[, list(idx, reg_idx, se)], idx ~ reg_idx, value.var = "se") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number() + 1, type = "se") %>%
  dplyr::mutate_at(vars(2:(ncol(est) - 2)), ~ paste0("$(", sprintf("%.2f", round(., 2)), ")$")) %>%
  mutate(across(1:ncol(.), ~ ifelse(.x == "$(NA)$", "", .x)))

var_labels <- unique(tmp[, list(idx, var_lab)])

reg_tbl <- bind_rows(est, se) %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(var_labels, by = "idx") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(idx = var_lab) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(var_lab = NULL) %>%
  dplyr::rename(var_lab = idx)
rm(est, se)

# note controls
ctrls <- data.table(var_lab = "Predictor controls", t(rep("Y", ncol(reg_tbl) - 3)))
ctrls <- rbind(ctrls, data.table(var_lab = "Liquidity controls", t(rep("Y", ncol(reg_tbl) - 3))))
ctrls[, group_id := 600 + 1:nrow(ctrls)]
ctrls[, type := ""]
names(ctrls) <- names(reg_tbl)
reg_tbl <- bind_rows(reg_tbl, ctrls)
rm(ctrls)

obs_and_r2 <- unique(data[, list(reg_idx, obs, r2)]) %>%
  mutate(
    obs = comma(obs),
    r2 = paste0("$", sprintf("%.3f", r2), "$")
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(., -reg_idx) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "reg_idx", values_from = "value") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(name = replace(name, name == "r2", "$R^2$")) %>%
  mutate(name = replace(name, name == "obs", "Obs")) %>%
  rename(var_lab = name) %>%
  mutate(group_id = c(1001, 1002), type = "")

reg_tbl <- bind_rows(reg_tbl, obs_and_r2) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(group_id) %>%
  mutate(var_lab = ifelse(type == "se", "", var_lab)) %>%
  mutate(type = NULL, group_id = NULL) %>%
  setDT()

# = add coef comparisions
tmp <- copy(data[idx %in% 6:9])

# add stars
tmp[, abs_tstat := abs(coef / se)]
tmp[, ss := ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[1], 3, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[2], 2, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[3], 1, 0)))]
tmp[, coef_lab := paste0("$", sprintf("%.2f", coef))]
tmp[, ss_lab := sapply(tmp[, ss], function(x) {
  ifelse(x > 0,
    # paste0("^{", strcat(rep("*", x)), "}$"),
    paste0("^{", strrep("*", x), "}$"),
    "$"
  )
})]
tmp[, coef_lab := paste0(coef_lab, ss_lab)]
tmp[, ss_lab := NULL]

var_labels <- unique(tmp[, list(idx, var_lab)]) # keep track of order

est <- dcast(tmp[, list(idx, reg_idx, coef_lab)], idx ~ reg_idx, value.var = "coef_lab") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number(), type = "coef") %>%
  mutate(across(1:ncol(.), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "", .x)))

se <- dcast(tmp[, list(idx, reg_idx, se)], idx ~ reg_idx, value.var = "se") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = 100 * row_number() + 1, type = "se") %>%
  dplyr::mutate_at(vars(2:(ncol(est) - 2)), ~ paste0("$(", sprintf("%.2f", round(., 2)), ")$")) %>%
  mutate(across(1:ncol(.), ~ ifelse(.x == "$(NA)$", "", .x)))

comp_tbl <- bind_rows(est, se) %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(var_labels, by = "idx") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(idx = var_lab) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(var_lab = NULL) %>%
  dplyr::rename(var_lab = idx) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(group_id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(var_lab = ifelse(type == "se", "", var_lab)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group_id = NULL, type = NULL) %>%
  setDT()


tbl <- rbind(reg_tbl, comp_tbl, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(across(1:ncol(.), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "", .x))) %>%
  setDT()
rm(est, se, tmp, obs_and_r2, reg_tbl, comp_tbl)

# add col columns
col_names <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("", paste0("(", 1:(ncol(tbl) - 1), ")")))))
names(col_names) <- names(tbl)
tbl <- bind_rows(col_names, tbl)
rm(col_names)

align_vector <- paste0("ll", paste0(rep("c", times = ncol(tbl) - 1), collapse = ""))
x.side <- xtable(tbl, align = align_vector)

this_add_to_row <- list(
  pos = list(-1, nrow(tbl) - 11, nrow(tbl) - 9, nrow(tbl) - 6, nrow(tbl)),
  command = c(
    "\\toprule \\multicolumn{11}{c}{Panel A: price impact regressions} \\\\\n \\hline
                                    & \\multicolumn{10}{c}{Dependent variable: stock return $r_{n,t}$} \\\\\n \\cmidrule(l){2-11}
                                    & \\multicolumn{5}{c}{FIT} & \\multicolumn{5}{c}{OFI} \\\\\n \\cmidrule(l){2-6} \\cmidrule(l){7-11} \n",
    rep("\\vspace{5pt}", 2),
    "\\hline \\multicolumn{11}{c}{Panel B: Coefficient differences} \\\\\n \\hline",
    "\\bottomrule \n"
  )
)

print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = FALSE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = this_add_to_row
)

to_dir <- "../output/tables/"
dir.create(to_dir, showWarnings = F, recursive = T)
print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = FALSE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = this_add_to_row,
  file = paste0(to_dir, "reg_dynamic_fm_stdev_separate_past_lags.tex")
)
```
